calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jun-09-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any party, counsel or interested person.

The Court noted that Petitioner Mary Cohen was not present. This matter was on calendar for Ms. Cohen's failure to pay the filing fees and verify her petition. An Order to Show Cause Re Contempt was issued on May 12, 2010. The original hearing on the petition was set for January 27, 2010. The matter has been continued five times as of May of 2010. The Court took the matter off calendar.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-09-2010 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar May-05-2010 Continued To Jun-09-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jonathan Ferdon for the Public Administrator.

The Court noted that Mary Cohen was not present. The Court continued the matter to June 9, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. An Order to Show Cause will issued to Mary Cohen to show why she should not be held in contempt for failure to appear. The return date is June 9, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Ferdon stated that he would like to know the status of the Wife's estate in San Mateo County.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.
